name: Excavation of the pit (excavation pit) with geodetic set-out
description: Excavation of the pit with geodetic set-out. The contractor claims a dug volume; the surveyor's as-built geodetic survey (as-built survey of the excavation pit) is the trusted reference, the geotech report confirms the design soil was reached at the excavation pit bottom (−9.0 m). Technical supervision accepts on the SURVEYED volume; money is KS-2/KS-3 at the excavation rate. Site scope (zone=SITE).

evidence.description: As-built geodetic survey of the excavation pit (survey of the excavation volume) — surveyed reference for the excavated volume and the achieved bottom elevation. Drives payment.
Geodetic set-out act / transfer of axes to the ground — site axes and pit outline transferred to the ground from the design.
Bearing-soil acceptance act / geology report — confirms the design bearing soil at pit bottom.
General works log — daily works log for the earthworks.

checks.description: Set-out act, as-built survey and bearing-soil acceptance are all attached.
Claimed excavated volume vs the as-built survey within 5% / 2 m³ (whichever greater) and within the survey's uncertainty U. Error normalized by the survey (VIM §2.16).

consequences.contractRef: BOQ 2.1 'Excavation of soil in the pit' @ EUR 18.00/m³
consequences.description: KS-3 on the surveyed pit volume, less 5% retention.
Pit bottom accepted, the raft may start.
